company.name: Astellas Pharma Inc.
company.subtitle: Total Revenue JPY 2.14T / ~\$14.3B FY2025 (+12%) | Strategic brands JPY 480B (Padcev + Izervay + Vyloy + Veozah + Xospata) | Xtandi JPY 961B core (LOE Aug 2027)
company.cashRunway: Self-funding (JPY 400B+ op cash flow); post-Iveric Bio \$5.9B Apr 2023 (Izervay) + Audentes \$3B 2020 (gene therapy)

indications.name: nmCRPC + mCRPC + mHSPC + EMBARK BCR (high-risk biochemical recurrence)

market.notes: Anti-androgen (AR signaling). w/ Pfizer 50/50 economic split. EMBARK BCR approval 2023 expanded label. Class peers: Erleada (JNJ), Nubeqa (Bayer/Orion).

assets.name: Padcev (enfortumab vedotin) — Nectin-4 ADC (UC; w/ Pfizer/Seagen 50/50)
assets.stage: Commercial (~$1.47B Astellas-share 2025, +35%); 1L UC w/ Keytruda new SoC

market.notes: Nectin-4 ADC with MMAE payload. EV-302 (w/ Keytruda) Ph3 1L UC positive 2023 -- new 1L SoC vs platinum chemo. Class first-in-class for Nectin-4. Class peer: Trodelvy (Gilead TROP2 ADC; UC failed).

assets.name: Heritage portfolio + Other revenues (smaller specialty + ROW alliance)

indications.name: Heritage tail (smaller brands + ROW alliance + Cresemba alliance + Other)

market.notes: Heritage tail (~JPY 300B / \$2B): Cresemba alliance (w/ Pfizer/Merck KGaA), ipragliflozin (Suglat T2D Japan-only), Mirabegron expansion (Asia), Astagraf ROW alliance, Tarceva ROW residual (post-LOE), Adempas? No that's Bayer. Other Pharma revenue + IP licensing.

assets.name: ASP-1929 (cetuximab + IRDye700 photoimmunotherapy) -- H&N
assets.stage: Phase 3 ASP-1929-381 H&N salvage; FDA filed Q4 2024

market.notes: First-in-class photoimmunotherapy: anti-EGFR mAb conjugated to NIR dye + laser activation. Approved in Japan 2020; FDA review pending.

mega_bear.narrative: Xtandi LOE 2027 cliff; Padcev share loss; Izervay vs Syfovre; Veozah vs Lynkuet
events: X Veozah lost vs Lynkuet (Bayer NK1/NK3 superior)

bear.narrative: Strategic brands offset Xtandi cliff; Padcev $5B+ peak; modest Vyloy/Izervay

base.narrative: Padcev $7B + Izervay $2B + Vyloy $2B + Veozah $1B; Xtandi cliff offset by strategic brands
events: V Padcev $7B+ across UC + bladder + adjuvant
V Veozah $1B (smaller vs Lynkuet but still meaningful)
V ASP-1929 PIT approved H&N salvage
V Padcev dominant 1L UC + adjuvant + earlier-line
V Vyloy CLDN18.2 expansion to pancreatic + biliary

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Multi-franchise dominance; full pipeline approved + Padcev $12B+ class leader

lastData.title: FY2025 Total Revenue JPY 2,139.2B / ~\$14.3B (+11.9% reported); core operating profit +41.6%. Strategic brands JPY 480B (+143.9B YoY) led by Padcev + Izervay + Vyloy.
points: FY2025 Total Revenue JPY 2,139.2B (~\$14.3B at JPY/USD 0.0067)
Xtandi JPY 961B (+5%); core franchise; LOE Aug 2027
Padcev JPY 221B (+35%); EV-302 Keytruda combo new 1L UC SoC
Izervay JPY 78B (+33%); GA q1-2mo IVT vs Syfovre (Apellis)
Vyloy JPY 63B (+110%); first CLDN18.2 gastric/GEJ (SPOTLIGHT + GLOW)
Veozah \$200M; NK3 menopause vs Lynkuet (Bayer NK1/NK3 dual)
Iveric Bio \$5.9B Apr 2023 brought Izervay; Audentes \$3B 2020 gene therapy platform
ASP-1929 photoimmunotherapy H&N FDA review pending
Pivekimab CD123 ADC for BPDCN (ex-ImmunoGen acq pivekimab via AbbVie ImmunoGen)

nextCatalyst.title: ASP-1929 PIT PDUFA + Padcev EV-303/304 + Xtandi LOE 2027
thresholds: H2 2026: Padcev EV-303 (1L MIBC) + EV-304 (perioperative) Ph3 readouts
Aug 2027: Xtandi US LOE -- generic enzalutamide launch

risks: Xtandi US LOE Aug 2027: \$6.4B 2025 -> -50% 2028; largest near-term cliff
Padcev vs Trodelvy (Gilead TROP2) + emerging UC class
Izervay vs Syfovre (Apellis pegcetacoplan first-in-class GA)
Vyloy CLDN18.2 vs bemarituzumab (Amgen anti-FGFR2b Ph3)
Veozah vs Lynkuet (Bayer elinzanetant NK1/NK3 superior efficacy in head-to-head)
Myrbetriq vs Gemtesa (Sumitomo vibegron beta-3) + generic OAB
Cresemba alliance economics (w/ Pfizer + Merck KGaA)
Iveric Bio + Audentes acquisition synergy realization

catalysts.title: Xtandi US LOE -- generic enzalutamide launch (-50% 2028 guide)
catalysts._rationale: Composition LOE Aug 2027; ANDA filers waiting.

catalysts.title: ASP-1929 PIT FDA decision (filed Q4 2024)
catalysts._rationale: Approved Japan 2020; novel mechanism FDA review uncertainty.

catalysts.title: Padcev EV-303 + EV-304 (1L MIBC + perioperative bladder) Ph3 readouts
catalysts._rationale: Earlier-line + perioperative MIBC expansion key for $10B+ ceiling.
